hero.title: How we think about operational structure.
hero.lead: These papers document the frameworks, failure patterns, and design principles that inform how we work. They're written to be useful to anyone building or running operational systems — not just Lexodd clients.

papers.title: Designing for exception visibility in multi-depot operations
papers.excerpt: Why most operations platforms surface failures too late, and how to design escalation logic that's proportional, automatic, and auditable.

papers.title: The accountability gap: why informal governance breaks at scale
papers.excerpt: A structural analysis of how accountability drifts when organisations grow beyond informal coordination — and what designed governance looks like in practice.

papers.title: Incremental delivery in high-stakes operational environments
papers.excerpt: How to structure a platform delivery when the operation can't afford downtime — sequencing, parallel running, and the rollout architecture that minimises risk.
